operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroHeadline: Junta de Paz de Trump para Gaza enfrenta crisis de liquidez y paraliza implementación del plan
heroSubtitle: Gazatíes soportan lluvias torrenciales en filas desesperadas por pan con todos los cruces terrestres cerrados más de 37 días consecutivos; condiciones de hambruna agravándose en toda la Franja de Gaza; más de 72,285 muertos desde el 7 de octubre de 2023
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,285+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / WAFA, Mar 31 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024). Board of Peace established Jan 2026 under UN Resolution 2803. UNDP shipments suspended Mar 25, 2026 after contraband discovery. Lancet Mortality Survey: 75,200 violent deaths through Jan 5, 2025. Houthis resumed missile attacks on Israel March 30 (first since Oct 2025 ceasefire); fourth coordinated barrage April 2 (5 light injuries). ICJ: Israel filed counter-memorial Mar 13–14; Netherlands, Iceland, Namibia, Hungary, USA, and Fiji filed interventions March 2026; Mar 22 ICJ order on basic needs/UNRWA unimplemented. UNRWA SitRep #214 (Apr 1–2): 571,000 in emergency hunger conditions, 18,000 await medical evacuation, 101,000+ children face acute malnutrition. All land crossings shut 34 consecutive days (since Feb 28). Trump (Apr 3): US will hit Iran 'extremely hard' in coming weeks.
